acceptance_signals: Governing CFD exists for project=vellum with shaped operator brief and an approved plan covering discovery through lookdev derive
Vellum repo canon + vault skeleton + public GitHub remote remain the durable project home
Architecture research (layers, free lessons, sibling steal-list, slices A–F) is recorded as evidence and mirrored in-repo
Asset register can represent the 37 Humble inventory items without keys
Operator webapp can browse/search assets and show redeem-by green/red
Intake can propose steps as IntakeRun records and enqueue worker jobs
At least one brittle download/import path can be driven with honest human checkpoints
Axiom registry probes/embed work; Vellum appears under Axiom Read (label Vellum)
Derived lookdev outputs can be linked to project lanes without copying raw packs into game repos
constraints: Canonical home is Control Alt Games, not Control Alt core (Axiom/Eidolon family)
Never store Humble/Epic/Unity keys in git or the public AptlyClever/vellum repo
Raw marketplace packs stay under /mnt/data/vault/vellum; product repos get derived lookdev only
Do not build a rights/approval department — redeem-by is a status light only
Do not treat Vellum as Unreal/Unity engine migration or a second Perforce
Sibling integration must use Axiom apps.registry + /api/effective/vellum patterns like Bandit/Conduit
Axiom Read nav is hardcoded today — adding Vellum under Read requires an explicit Axiom Shell.tsx change in addition to the Vellum webapp
Record work in CFD (or faithful CFD-shaped records mirrored in the Vellum repo) so agents do not lose the trail
desired_outcome: Vellum is the Control Alt Games asset vault and visual prototyping accelerator: a private vault at /mnt/data/vault/vellum, a searchable asset register, a full webapp that can propose and drive intake (including brittle download/import jobs), and an Axiom Read-nav sibling surface. Architecture follows research: Bandit-shaped outside (FastAPI webapp), Conduit-shaped inside (API + workers), register smart / vault dumb / derived outputs for game consumers. Redeem-by dates are indicator-only (green to red). One human + agents for ~1 year; scale via more assets, game projects, and agents — not enterprise DAM or Perforce.

evidence.summary: Completed architecture research for Vellum: industry DAM layers (storage/catalog/ingest/workers/consumers/UI), free lessons (folders≠catalog, rights as light, staged intake, Perforce≠vault, API-first for agents), Control Alt sibling steal-list (Bandit outside, Conduit inside, Axiom Read nav hardcoded), recommended objects (Asset/IntakeRun/Job/DerivedOutput/ProjectLane), and slices A–F. Operator answers mapped. Deliverable: Cursor canvas vellum-architecture-research.canvas.tsx; mirrored into Vellum docs/cfd/.

Canon bootstrap already on main: project root /mnt/temp/config/vellum, vault /mnt/data/vault/vellum skeleton, handoff docs, Axiom apps.registry+product-catalog+handbook+allowlist mounts, public GitHub AptlyClever/vellum (caf2edd + 90b47e5).

non_negotiables: No keys or raw packs in git
Register is source of truth for identity; folders are not
API-first so agents and UI share the same intake/job surface
rejected_approaches: Dumping packs into Bandit/LCARD/Threshold Affairs repos
Hosting the vault only inside Axiom without a Vellum app
Relying on chat memory instead of durable CFD/register records
requests: Keep all of this work recorded in CFD or CFD-shaped mirrors so the trail survives chat
Prefer Bandit-shaped webapp + Conduit-shaped workers per architecture research
Put Vellum under Axiom leftnav Read category when the webapp exists

plan.title: Vellum build plan (research slices A–F)
plan.summary:
Bandit-shaped webapp, Conduit-shaped workers, register-smart vault-dumb. Discovery+canon first; then A–F.

Approval note: Operator approved research-aligned slices A–F plan. Discovery+canon evidence to be attached immediately; no Runner dispatch yet.

problem: Control Alt Games owns a Humble Unreal/Unity asset bundle and related lookdev needs across Threshold Affairs, Field Command, Hail, LCARD, and Slots/Bandit, but there is no durable project that can ingest, catalog, and reuse those packs without dumping binaries into product repos or pretending this is Control Alt core infrastructure. Canon was salvaged into docs, then named Vellum; architecture research now exists, but the work is not yet bound as a governing CFD with acceptance and a plan agents can follow.
